## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content production, review process, and technical SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/8zZ9XXUgimSBeYbDaXu17FkQRJWEB7ed?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content is on track:** 17 articles published, maintaining the 5/week cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/8zZ9XXUgimSBeYbDaXu17FkQRJWEB7ed?tab=summary&timestamp=238.0)
  - [**Review process is a bottleneck:** Product team reviews are extensive, especially for category topics (e.g., QM).](https://fathom.video/share/8zZ9XXUgimSBeYbDaXu17FkQRJWEB7ed?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
  - [**New strategy to scale reviews:** Oren will record briefings on key topics (e.g., QM, Coaching) to create reusable artifacts, saving significant review time.](https://fathom.video/share/8zZ9XXUgimSBeYbDaXu17FkQRJWEB7ed?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)
  - [**Critical SEO issue found:** 130 URLs (blogs, case studies) are "discovered but not indexed" in GSC; GrowthX now has owner access to fix it.](https://fathom.video/share/8zZ9XXUgimSBeYbDaXu17FkQRJWEB7ed?tab=summary&timestamp=830.0)

## Topics

### Content Production & Review

  - [**Production Status:** 17 articles published, maintaining the 5/week cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/8zZ9XXUgimSBeYbDaXu17FkQRJWEB7ed?tab=summary&timestamp=238.0)
  - [**Review Bottleneck:** The product team's extensive reviews are a bottleneck, especially for category topics like Quality Management (QM).](https://fathom.video/share/8zZ9XXUgimSBeYbDaXu17FkQRJWEB7ed?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** Aida noted the issue stems from two factors:](https://fathom.video/share/8zZ9XXUgimSBeYbDaXu17FkQRJWEB7ed?tab=summary&timestamp=474.0)
      - [**Researcher Workflow:** Broad research questions → drafts conflating nuanced concepts.](https://fathom.video/share/8zZ9XXUgimSBeYbDaXu17FkQRJWEB7ed?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [**Artifact Gaps:** Lack of detailed tactical documentation from Cresta on topics like QM scorecard building.](https://fathom.video/share/8zZ9XXUgimSBeYbDaXu17FkQRJWEB7ed?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
  - [**Solution:** Aida's team will update artifacts (writing guidelines, company context) with recurring feedback and constrain researcher workflows to improve draft quality.](https://fathom.video/share/8zZ9XXUgimSBeYbDaXu17FkQRJWEB7ed?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)

### New Strategy: Expert Briefings as Artifacts

  - [**Proposal:** Devon suggested Oren record briefings on key topics to create reusable artifacts.](https://fathom.video/share/8zZ9XXUgimSBeYbDaXu17FkQRJWEB7ed?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This proactive step will save significant review time.](https://fathom.video/share/8zZ9XXUgimSBeYbDaXu17FkQRJWEB7ed?tab=summary&timestamp=738.0)
      - [**Time Savings:** An estimated 1-hour briefing could save 4–5 hours of review time over several months.](https://fathom.video/share/8zZ9XXUgimSBeYbDaXu17FkQRJWEB7ed?tab=summary&timestamp=778.0)
  - [**Execution:** GrowthX will schedule a briefing with Oren on Coaching and QM.](https://fathom.video/share/8zZ9XXUgimSBeYbDaXu17FkQRJWEB7ed?tab=summary&timestamp=738.0)

### Technical SEO & Indexing

  - [**GSC Access:** Annie granted GrowthX owner access to GSC, enabling them to manually submit pages for indexing.](https://fathom.video/share/8zZ9XXUgimSBeYbDaXu17FkQRJWEB7ed?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)
  - [**Indexing Issue:** Aida found 130 URLs are "discovered but not indexed" in GSC.](https://fathom.video/share/8zZ9XXUgimSBeYbDaXu17FkQRJWEB7ed?tab=summary&timestamp=830.0)
      - [**Impact:** This includes valuable content like blogs, case studies, and webinars, not just low-priority author pages.](https://fathom.video/share/8zZ9XXUgimSBeYbDaXu17FkQRJWEB7ed?tab=summary&timestamp=864.0)
  - [**Investigation:** Annie will investigate the root cause in Webflow to prevent recurrence.](https://fathom.video/share/8zZ9XXUgimSBeYbDaXu17FkQRJWEB7ed?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)

### Future Planning & Team Transition

  - [**Topic Approval:** Devon will review the new batch of keyword-researched topics, which are more aligned with the audience's pain points than the initial list.](https://fathom.video/share/8zZ9XXUgimSBeYbDaXu17FkQRJWEB7ed?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
  - [**Team Transition:** Bailey will take over as the engagement manager for Phase 2, starting next week.](https://fathom.video/share/8zZ9XXUgimSBeYbDaXu17FkQRJWEB7ed?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
      - [**Rationale:** GrowthX uses a dedicated "sprint team" for onboarding to ensure a repeatable process and quickly assess client fit before integrating with the main delivery team.](https://fathom.video/share/8zZ9XXUgimSBeYbDaXu17FkQRJWEB7ed?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Aida:**](https://fathom.video/share/8zZ9XXUgimSBeYbDaXu17FkQRJWEB7ed?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
      - [Update artifacts & constrain researcher workflow to improve draft quality.](https://fathom.video/share/8zZ9XXUgimSBeYbDaXu17FkQRJWEB7ed?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
      - [Review the 130 unindexed URLs and resubmit high-value pages.](https://fathom.video/share/8zZ9XXUgimSBeYbDaXu17FkQRJWEB7ed?tab=summary&timestamp=830.0)
      - [Send new drafts by EOW; send 2-month priority plan next week.](https://fathom.video/share/8zZ9XXUgimSBeYbDaXu17FkQRJWEB7ed?tab=summary&timestamp=986.0)
  - [**Annie:**](https://fathom.video/share/8zZ9XXUgimSBeYbDaXu17FkQRJWEB7ed?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
      - [Investigate the root cause of the unindexed URLs in Webflow.](https://fathom.video/share/8zZ9XXUgimSBeYbDaXu17FkQRJWEB7ed?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
      - [Send the GA4 report.](https://fathom.video/share/8zZ9XXUgimSBeYbDaXu17FkQRJWEB7ed?tab=summary&timestamp=42.0)
  - [**Devon:**](https://fathom.video/share/8zZ9XXUgimSBeYbDaXu17FkQRJWEB7ed?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
      - [Review the new topic list and provide feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/8zZ9XXUgimSBeYbDaXu17FkQRJWEB7ed?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
      - [Schedule the expert briefing with Oren on Coaching and QM.](https://fathom.video/share/8zZ9XXUgimSBeYbDaXu17FkQRJWEB7ed?tab=summary&timestamp=738.0)
